detail.description: Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to second baseman Travis Bazzana. Royce Lewis to 2nd.
Alex Jackson singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Alex Jackson singles on a fly ball to right fielder Randal Grichuk. Tristan Gray scores.
Alex Jackson singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Davis Martin. Tristan Gray to 3rd.

pitches.typeDescription: With Alex Jackson batting, Tristan Gray advances to 2nd on a balk.
pitches.callDescription: With Alex Jackson batting, Tristan Gray advances to 2nd on a balk.

detail.description: Alex Jackson doubles (3) on a fly ball to center fielder Ezequiel Duran. Luke Keaschall scores.
Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Alex Jackson doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Wyatt Langford.
Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Ryan Kreidler scores. Josh Bell scores. Alex Jackson to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Alex Jackson singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Jose Cabrera.
Alex Jackson singles on a ground ball to second baseman Gleyber Torres, deflected by pitcher Beau Brieske.
Alex Jackson singles on a bunt ground ball to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd.

Alex Jackson singles on a line drive to right fielder Rikuu Nishida. Orlando Arcia out at home on the throw, right fielder Rikuu Nishida to catcher Drew Romo. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd.
Alex Jackson singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Alex Jackson singles on a line drive to left fielder Kevin Alcántara. Austin Martin to 2nd.
Alex Jackson homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
